key_risks: HIGH: File operation with externally-controlled path (S3)

findings.title: Unsafe deserialization via pdfplumber.open()
findings.description: Code uses pdfplumber.open() which can execute arbitrary code during deserialization
findings.remediation: Replace pickle with JSON or MessagePack. Use yaml.safe_load() instead of yaml.load().

findings.title: File operation with externally-controlled path
findings.description: File path comes from external input
findings.remediation: Validate and sanitize file paths. Use an allowlist of permitted directories.
